shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Patchy Fog
name: Tonight
detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 11pm, then patchy fog. Partly cloudy, with a low around 58. Southwest wind 5 to 9 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
